---
title : "The Reproducibility Crisis in Science: A Statistical Counterattack"
date : "2015-06-01"
author : ["Roger Peng"]
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Significance, 12(3) 30--32  [https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1740-9713.2015.00827.x](https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1740-9713.2015.00827.x)"
publication_short : "Significance, 12(3) 30--32  [https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1740-9713.2015.00827.x](https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1740-9713.2015.00827.x)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Roger Peng (2015). *The Reproducibility Crisis in Science: A Statistical Counterattack*. Significance, 12(3) 30--32  [https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1740-9713.2015.00827.x](https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1740-9713.2015.00827.x)

:::
